name: Feature request

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Package(s) affected

Which package(s) would this touch?
- [ ] `@facenode/avatar-core`
- [ ] `@facenode/avatar-sdk`
- [ ] `@facenode/hermes-adapter`
- [ ] `@facenode/ui`
- [ ] `apps/web-avatar`
- [ ] `apps/dashboard`
- [ ] docs / examples

## Additional context

Links, mockups, related issues.
